metadata.title: Our Story | Layan Jewellery
metadata.description: Discover Layan Jewellery, your trusted destination for fine gold and diamond jewelry in Aleppo, Syria.

subtitle: Your trusted destination for fine gold and diamond jewelry in Aleppo, Syria.
quote: Excellence in jewelry is not just about gold and gemstones, but about the trust we build with every piece we create.

video.title: Our Story
video.description1: At Layan Jewellery, every piece tells a story of tradition, quality, and artistic excellence.
video.description2: We take pride in crafting jewelry that blends timeless elegance with modern design, creating pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments.

missionVision.subtitle: Guided by tradition, driven by excellence, and committed to creating timeless pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments.
missionVision.missionText: To create exceptional jewelry that combines traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design, providing our clients with timeless pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments while maintaining the highest standards of quality and integrity.
missionVision.visionText: To be the most trusted jewelry brand in Syria, continuing our tradition of excellence while embracing innovation and sustainable practices that will benefit future generations.

heritage.subtitle: We are committed to serving our clients with the same dedication and fine craftsmanship.
heritage.founderCaption: Layan Jewellery — a name built on trust
heritage.chapter1Text1: We started with a simple vision: to offer the finest gold and diamond jewelry to our clients, crafted with care and sold with honesty.
heritage.chapter1Text2: Our commitment to quality and customer trust became the foundation upon which we build everything.
heritage.chapter1Address: محافظة حلب، شارع الفرقان، شارع مفرروشات الفتال
heritage.chapter2Text: Located in Aleppo, we serve our clients with exceptional quality, honest dealings, and a passion for fine jewelry craftsmanship.
heritage.addressText: محافظة حلب، شارع الفرقان، شارع مفرروشات الفتال، حلب
